About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data shows two exceptionally strong performers at the top of the momentum ranking. EFXT leads at rank 1 with a composite score of 96.4, displaying remarkable consistency across all timeframes—1-year return of 198.98% with all four SMA gates passing and a strong bad_spy_score of 3.16, indicating it holds up well during market downturns. GLTO ranks 2 with extreme longer-term returns (623% over 1 year, 843% over 6 months) but shows more volatile ratio progression, with a spike from 2.01% 1-week returns to 21.04% 1-month returns suggesting recent acceleration. The key difference is that EFXT demonstrates smoother, more consistent ratio scaling (ratios of 1.37 to 4.42 across periods), while GLTO has more erratic jumps (0.74 to 10.44), which the dashboard flags as "overextended" momentum for EFXT versus potentially less stable growth for GLTO. Both tickers significantly outpace SPY and QQQ across multiple timeframes, with GLTO's 1-year outperformance of 605.7% versus SPY being particularly notable, though the data suggests EFXT may offer more reliable
